{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002122C0F0F49EB85A1CF3BF13"}"},"total":2854},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401136634053722904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看啊，咕咕好帅，吱吱拍老婆居然只是想让老婆当员工在，不争气的吱吱啊，能从文字中体验到的恐惧，说真的晚上我可能都不敢看[快哭了][快哭了]太身临其境了。作者大大加油，真的真的真的很好看啊。根本不够看，看了一章之后根本停不下来。","text_exts":[{"e":114,"s":108,"text":"根本停不下来","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742828821CF3BF13%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401136634053722904%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227389844923631012889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723214323,"group_id":"7389844923631012889","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼是真咸鱼，摆烂也是真的摆烂。嘿嘿(*￣︶￣)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1M8wKTsxLO9Tfp1meMAv5djmIVMwhI46LggUWBCyzLx","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a344a9941c2a4e2e999acd8befe8e863~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883570&x-signature=1eVmSykd4X7sBRJUbxq20SQiDQ4%3D","user_id":"1069142486039086","user_name":"摆烂真理"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1069142486039086","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389844923631012889","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主，不是男频，高亮！】
为振兴师父留下的道观，祁故进入娱乐圈，努力营业。

却被经纪人反咬，黑了个底朝天。

退圈后，祁故深觉自己越努力越不幸，开始躺平摆烂。

偶然的机会，他在事主介绍下参加了一档灵异综艺。

节目中，他放弃营业，随缘摆烂。

却凭借自己在恐怖场景前大吃零食，仿佛春游的松弛感以及一手抓鬼技术收获无数粉丝，全网爆红。

再后来，传闻中的异管局大佬对他抛出橄榄枝。

祁故在赴约当天，惊讶发现这位大佬竟是与自己同上一个综艺，怕鬼怕得要命的素人帅哥。

祁故：……6

情绪稳定，日常摆烂的吃货耿直受（祁故）x咸鱼戏精大佬攻（蔺寒枝）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e4ba75b3f500932cb2cea05f96a5e42f","author":"鹤灯","author_id":"","book_id":"7389844923631012889","book_name":"谁家糊咖还不会捉鬼啦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":863,"name":"戏精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=863&name=戏精&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389846873978176025","read_count":"19191","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"644000"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"275","tags":"双男主,娱乐圈,直播,大佬,现代,戏精,捉鬼,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ce7f0c2ffeb7bdf81fb6d65f0047aab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466882&x-signature=xDJxX8Slr33fVXE7VgofOhnjOkk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1344021249146115","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002122C0F0F49EB85A1CF3BF13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19343,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":25659},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7535440215337141054","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，真的好好看，最后一个小故事真的看的我惊心动魄的，前世今生那一段，作者把咕咕命格倒霉，和吱吱当年发生的事情的原因都写出来了，还有吱吱咕咕的前世，真的好有宿命感，吱吱咕咕前世be了[哭]，这一世一定会一直幸福下去的[飞吻][飞吻]。然后后面，吱吱喊“妈妈”的那一段，救命真的哭了[哭]，也算是见了妈妈最后一面了[快哭了]。最后那个番外一真的看的我心里暖暖的。最最后，吱吱咕咕一定要一直一直幸福下去！！！[飞吻][飞吻]
然后真的好爱这种群像文啊嘻嘻[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754487554,"group_id":"7389844923631012889","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2925154626443528"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389844923631012889","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"419"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":69963,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":130167,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7535427001410241342","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好好看，第一次看这种类型的文，作者的文笔很好，每个小故事都好催泪，尤其我印象最深刻的就是将军府的那个故事，真的给我看哭了都[快哭了][快哭了]，然后每个故事的后面他们都有一个还算好的结局，看的我心里暖暖的[送心][送心]。然后就是吱吱咕咕，嘻嘻嘻都好可爱，好甜[飞吻][飞吻][送心]，但是吱吱的童年经历真的让我好心疼，看的时候会想，要是吱吱的家人还活着，那多好啊[快哭了][快哭了] ，我还差一个小故事没看完，也不知道后面吱吱有没有可以和他的家人再见上一面，希望有吧，真的好心疼[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]，最后这个小说真的好好看呀[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":103,"s":101,"text":"暖暖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742828821CF3BF13%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535427001410241342%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227389844923631012889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754482755,"group_id":"7389844923631012889","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"被语文.数学.英语.物理.化学.地理支配的瑟瑟发抖的小可怜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9q2U2ww6TSnCAsMY4VfOCWmC77ngkUk6JpkBMgh9sj7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5a3397fce4f14089bb2c3f90173f5d40~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882699&x-signature=wgCUDAop5QymxtqINOOwaADu9Ds%3D","user_id":"2925154626443528","user_name":"Haᴗanꫛ."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2925154626443528","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389844923631012889","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主，不是男频，高亮！】

情绪稳定，日常摆烂的吃货耿直受（祁故）x咸鱼戏精大佬攻（蔺寒枝）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e4ba75b3f500932cb2cea05f96a5e42f","author":"鹤灯","author_id":"","book_id":"7389844923631012889","book_name":"谁家糊咖还不会捉鬼啦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":863,"name":"戏精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=863&name=戏精&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389846873978176025","read_count":"19191","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"644000"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"275","tags":"双男主,娱乐圈,直播,大佬,现代,戏精,捉鬼,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ce7f0c2ffeb7bdf81fb6d65f0047aab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466882&x-signature=xDJxX8Slr33fVXE7VgofOhnjOkk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1344021249146115","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"402"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002122C0F0F49EB85A1CF3BF13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":68721,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":128918,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7605},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617484727352705817","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"（内涵剧透，建议的人可以不看）我承认我看书是看一半就跑路的类型，但这本书在我接着看的时候又有了别样的感情，感情线十分明显，而且里面也没有什么额外的拖沓剧情，内容细分安排的很紧凑。就像一个故事看完另一个故事就出现了。让人不禁沉浸其中，并且里面的主角不是那种柔柔弱弱的类型，反而是独立坚强的形象。吱吱咕咕的爱情从一开始的懵懂无知到后面的爱意浓深，像两只变色龙在遇到对方后都卸下了各自的伪装，他们的爱可以是一见钟情也可以说水到渠成。一切的缘分都早已在前世种下因果，他们的爱轰轰烈烈昭告天下，而故事中的其他人也很有趣，像：手刃恶鬼的苗玥实际上却是三坑少女？！看似普普通通的小老头则是地下阴官？！手持藏族法器的普布格桑却喜好吃糖乐并忠于打游戏。他们的形象有趣又刻骨铭心，所有人都在为了救世付出努力，有的群像那味（？）反正看了不亏！而且越看越上头哦！建议一口气看完[爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":204,"s":200,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742828821CF3BF13%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617484727352705817%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227389844923631012889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773586884,"group_id":"7389844923631012889","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今夜的
